prose.voice: Warm, quick, generous. An entrepreneur who optimizes her own life for the joy of it and cannot wait to show a friend what she found.
prose.lore: Maya's friend and the one who first shows her Claude Code. A relentless personal-automation tinkerer, a 'Claude Code maxer' who has taught her own laptop to do her repeated work. She is the on-ramp: she gets Maya up to speed on building a compounding local AI workspace, which doubles Maya's reach and sets up the deeper realization that personal speed alone is not enough. Modeled on a real person, Christine McDannell, included with her approval.
prose.rules: Render in the warm editorial register, built from her photo stack, never a painting-of-a-painting. Load-bearing identity: a white woman with long wavy BLONDE hair worn down, center-parted, falling past the shoulders, and a warm wide open smile. Default wardrobe: a relaxed cream or white blazer over a simple top. Signature prop: a sticker-covered laptop, the tinkerer's workshop. Keep her warm and energetic, never corporate. She is a REAL person included with approval; ship only the public friend-who-loves-automation persona, nothing private.

approval.note: Gary relayed Christine's approval to be included in this book, 2026-07-23.

wardrobeEras.default: A relaxed cream or white blazer over a simple top; long wavy blonde hair worn down.
